name: Field Ripened Tomatoes with Green Beans and 100-year
recipeIngredient: Coarse fleur de sel salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes into halves and place in a shallow dish.
2. Add the diced shallots, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the julienne of basil.
4. Marinate for two hours.
5. Serve chilled with green beans and mesclun greens garnish.
6. Drizzle a few drops of Balsamic vinegar on top before serving.
Yield: 4 servings
